/home-content.content:
Compress pdf is used in every field of life such as assignments, office reports, invoices, resumes,ebooks, forms and official documents. Users face many problems because of its long size.Many time large file delivery is late as they take a long time to upload and some time do not even send.The solution to your problem is to compress pdf for free.

Once you upload your pdf file, you can set your desired dpi , percentage and color whether you want gray or no colour. By default we have set some for our users for ease. You can download your file in one click or you can directly share your file by using google drive ,dropbox and email. The thing that makes our website unique is you can preview your file before download, you can erase your file. In case you did not get your desired result you can simply restart.

You do not need to create a account or login as you can compress pdf document, on your browser.

Why Use Our Compress PDF Tool?

We built this tool so any user can easily manage their pdf file with this user-friendly site.Weather you are student ,freelancer and businessman.

Fast Compression Speed

Our system uses optimized algorithms that compress your file in seconds.You do not need to wait as you get a quick response.

Multiple File Support

Replace with your text.You can upload multiple files at a time and can get their compressed version in one click.

Preview before Download

You can review your compressed file without downloading it, and can set the quality percentage.

High Compression with Good Quality

You get reduced file size but text is readable and has a clear image.

Secure & Private Processing

We encrypt your file so that no one can read it. Your encrypted file is directly uploaded and after processing it gets deleted successfully. No one can access your file.

Works on Every Device

It works fine on every devises mobile, laptop, ipad and system.You only need internet connection and browser

Completely Free

pdf compress pdf is completely free.There are no any hidden charges.

faq.question: How to compress a PDF to reduce it's size?
faq.answer:
1.Click in the file selection box at the top of the page and select the files to compress.

2.Change the compression parameters if you want. Start the compression with the corresponding button.

3.Finally, save the compressed files.

faq.question: What does compressing a PDF do?
faq.answer:
When reducing the file size of a PDF, various methods are used to make the file smaller. Depending on what data is contained in the PDF, the compression works well or less well. PDF files with e.g. images can be compressed well. PDF24 uses the following techniques to compress a PDF.

1.Removal of font information that's not required for displaying the PDF.

2.Reduction of the image size depending on the DPI parameter.

3.Reduction of the image quality depending on the image quality parameter.

4.PDF file changes and data compression of a structural nature.

cards.title: How to compress PDF files
cards.description: Select PDF file that you want to compress. Drop your files and start your compression. After few seconds, download your compressed file.

cards.title: Adjustable quality
cards.description: To get perfect results, you can adjust compression quality to set compression algorithm according to your needs. PDF files with images gives good results rather than text-only PDFs

cards.title: Easy to use
cards.description: Compress PDF make the porcess fast and easy for you. You dont need to install any software, just select or drop your files and start your process.

cards.title: Runs on your system
cards.description: This compression tool does not need any special system. It is browser based and can easily work on any operating system.

cards.title: No installation required
cards.description: No need to download or install any software. PDF files dont use your system's resources and get compress on cloud.

cards.title: Secure online compression
cards.description: This tool do not keep your pdf files for too long. Your files and results gets deleted automatically after few seconds.

/legal/privacy-policy.title: Privacy policy
/legal/privacy-policy.content:
This agreement basically describes the conditions or rules which relate to APIMS TEC (“Ours company”).We provide services in compresspdf.id

This agreement, According to concern of ‘The Republic of indonesia’, without any conflict of laws of principles, You agree according to this agreement of legal case related to, ‘The Republic of Latvia’ through file in court and will decide.

Whenever, you will use compresspdf.id services, you will have to agree these rules & conditions given below:

  1. If you use pdfcompressor.com services, the responsibility will be yours as well.
  2. You will be responsible for all your data even when you send it to pcompresspdf.id.
  3. Do you agree, you will not upload illegal material, 
  4. Do you agree, you will not integrate compresspdf.id into a third party application.
  5. You can use compresspdf.id services for every purpose either personal or commercial, it’s up to you.
  6. We have all access either we change or close compresspdf.id services.
  7. We have the right to change the terms of this agreement anytime, anywhere.
  8. compresspdf.id services does not provide any guarantee related to it.
  9. The data which you submit and files which are generated, store maximum for at least 1 hour, after that deleted it by permanently.
  10. Our company does not have any access to that data which are submitted or files are generated, except at that situation when law enforcement authorities are needed.
  11. To improve the quality of services, we can access your metadata with the help of your support.
  12.  Google collects data on this site and normally uses cookies for ads personalization and measurement. You can easily go to your Google account setting and will stop personalization anytime, For further we will use cookies for statistical purposes. To use this site you agree to the use of cookies.
